Initializer# init(id:title:subtitle:favorite:scope:credentials:tags:)

iOS 26.1+iPadOS 26.1+Mac Catalyst 26.1+macOS 26.1+visionOS 26.1+

```
init(
    id: Data,
    title: String,
    subtitle: String? = nil,
    favorite: Bool = false,
    scope: ASImportableCredentialScope? = nil,
    credentials: [ASImportableCredential],
    tags: [String] = []
)
```
